mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.`desc`, p.scenicCount, '' AS heat, CASE WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN '综合景区' ELSE '单体景区' END AS tag, p.tagsRaw, p.parkType, CASE WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isSingleScenic, p.imageUrl FROM ( SELECT a.area_code AS id, a.area_name AS name, a.intro AS `desc`, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM scenic_spot s WHERE s.area_id = a.id AND s.status = 1 ) AS scenicCount, a.tags AS tagsRaw, a.park_type AS parkType, a.image_url AS imageUrl, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM scenic_area a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ) p ORDER BY p.updatedAt DESC

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.`desc`, p.scenicCount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.heatScore, 0) > 0 THEN CONCAT('热度 ', COALESCE(p.heatScore, 0)) ELSE '' END AS heat, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.heatScore, 0) > 0 THEN '热门' WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN '综合景区' ELSE '单体景区' END AS tag, p.tagsRaw, p.parkType, CASE WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isSingleScenic, p.imageUrl FROM ( SELECT a.id AS areaId, a.area_code AS id, a.area_name AS name, a.intro AS `desc`, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM scenic_spot s WHERE s.area_id = a.id AND s.status = 1 ) AS scenicCount, COALESCE(h.heatScore, 0) AS heatScore, a.tags AS tagsRaw, a.park_type AS parkType, a.image_url AS imageUrl, a.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM scenic_area a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT matched_area_id, COUNT(1) AS heatScore FROM tourist_behavior_record WHERE matched_area_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY matched_area_id ) h ON h.matched_area_id = a.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ) p ORDER BY COALESCE(p.heatScore, 0) DESC, p.updatedAt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.`desc`, p.scenicCount, '' AS heat, CASE WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN '综合景区' ELSE '单体景区' END AS tag, p.tagsRaw, p.parkType, CASE WHEN p.scenicCount > 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isSingleScenic, p.introduction, p.openInfo, p.location, p.imageUrl FROM ( SELECT a.area_code AS id, a.area_name AS name, a.intro AS `desc`, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM scenic_spot s WHERE s.area_id = a.id AND s.status = 1 ) AS scenicCount, a.tags AS tagsRaw, a.park_type AS parkType, a.history_intro AS introduction, a.open_info AS openInfo, a.location AS location, a.image_url AS imageUrl FROM scenic_area a WHERE a.area_code = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ) p

SELECT s.scene_code AS id, a.area_code AS parkId, s.name AS name, s.intro AS `desc`, s.open_time AS time, '' AS duration, '景点' AS badge, s.tags AS tagsRaw, s.image_url AS imageUrl, '' AS heat FROM scenic_spot s INNER JOIN scenic_area a ON s.area_id = a.id WHERE a.area_code = #{parkId} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC

SELECT CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AS spotId, s.scene_code AS scenicId, s.name AS spotName, s.name AS scenicName, s.latitude, s.longitude, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.audio_text, ''), NULLIF(s.intro, ''), s.name) AS guideText, s.intro, COALESCE(s.recommended_duration_min, 15) AS recommendedStayMin, COALESCE(s.sort_order, 0) AS sortOrder FROM scenic_spot s INNER JOIN scenic_area a ON s.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT spot_id, COUNT(1) AS heat_score FROM tourist_behavior_event WHERE spot_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spot_id ) h ON h.spot_id = s.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND s.status = 1 AND COALESCE(s.deleted, 0) = 0 AND s.latitude IS NOT NULL AND s.longitude IS NOT NULL AND ( (#{areaId} IS NOT NULL AND #{areaId} != '' AND (a.area_code = #{areaId} OR CAST(a.id AS CHAR) = #{areaId})) OR ((#{areaId} IS NULL OR #{areaId} = '') AND #{parkId} IS NOT NULL AND #{parkId} != '' AND (a.area_code = #{parkId} OR CAST(a.id AS CHAR) = #{parkId})) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(s.sort_order, 0) ASC, COALESCE(h.heat_score, 0) DESC, s.id ASC

SELECT s.scene_code AS id, a.area_code AS parkId, s.name AS name, s.intro AS `desc`, s.open_time AS time, '' AS duration, '景点' AS badge, s.tags AS tagsRaw, s.intro AS introduction, s.highlight AS highlightsRaw, s.remark AS tipsRaw, s.image_url AS imageUrl, '' AS heat FROM scenic_spot s INNER JOIN scenic_area a ON s.area_id = a.id WHERE s.scene_code = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND s.status = 1
SELECT n.id AS id, n.title AS title, n.description AS `desc` FROM notice n ORDER BY n.id DESC

SELECT c.avatar_id AS avatarId, COALESCE(r.avatar_name, c.avatar_id) AS avatarName, '' AS clothesMode, c.voice_id AS voiceId, c.voice_name AS voiceName, c.welcome_text AS welcomeText, r.gender AS gender, r.clothing_name AS clothingName, COALESCE(r.model_path, c.avatar_id) AS modelPath, r.preview_image AS previewImage, r.remark AS remark FROM scenic_digital_human_config c LEFT JOIN digital_human_resource r ON c.avatar_id = r.avatar_id AND (r.is_enabled = 1 OR r.is_enabled IS NULL) LEFT JOIN scenic_area a ON a.id = c.park_id WHERE c.is_enabled = 1 AND ( CAST(c.park_id AS CHAR) = #{parkId} OR a.area_code = #{parkId} ) LIMIT 1
